response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, which aligns with the role's GenAI/agentic focus. However, the resume shows only ~1 year of explicit GenAI work, no demonstrated RAG/vector database experience, no clear cloud-platform AI system delivery, and no evidence of customer-facing technical leadership at the Staff FDE level required. Strong engineering fundamentals make him a plausible 'maybe' pending a screen on depth of recent AI work.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
15+ years shipping production systems across TypeScript/Node, with AWS CDK exposure at Optilyz
Proven craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus public teaching/workshop history
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience on resume
Limited evidence of customer-facing discovery or enterprise consulting/FDE responsibilities
GenAI experience appears to be ~1 year vs. the 8+ years of AI-driven solutions required

key_factors.factor: Insufficient GenAI/RAG depth vs. 8+ year requirement
Current MCP and agent infrastructure work at re:cinq
